name: Slice Golf
about: Slice Golf is an indoor golf simulator venue located in Evansville, WI. They offer simulator bays for practice and play, along with a bar atmosphere. The venue features premium GSPro simulation software with access to over 150,000 golf courses and online tournament capabilities. Hours are Monday-Friday 2pm-10pm and Saturday-Sunday 10am-10pm. They host leagues and private events, making it a social hub for golfers in the area.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium GSPro simulation software with 4k graphics and realistic ball physics
Access to over 150,000 global golf courses and online tournament play
Social atmosphere with bar service and regular leagues for all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site kitchen; partnerships with local restaurants for food delivery
Full bar service with beer specials during events and leagues

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify, but it is standard practice for simulator venues to allow players to bring their own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food may be allowed, but the venue has a full bar and partners with local restaurants for food delivery options.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A typical 18-hole round takes about an hour and a half on the simulator.

faq.question: Is Slice Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue does not specifically mention child-friendly policies, but it is open to the public and hosts events that could accommodate families.
